sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97203" key="strhnu/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρηνύζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στρηνής</etym>) <sense id="n97203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trumpet</tr_>, of elephants, Juba <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope> </bibl> (corr. Schneider for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στρυνύζω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
